description: Testing best practices: test pyramid and what to actually test, Pest/PHPUnit and Vitest/Jest idioms, Playwright/Dusk e2e discipline, factories and fixtures, mocking boundaries, flaky-test causes, coverage traps — plus the TDD workflow (red-green-refactor, red-green regression proof for bug fixes). Includes /testing:review and a test-engineer worker agent.

reasons: out-of-band: install via install-agents.sh (Codex plugins cannot bundle subagents); model omitted (inherits session model)
